entities.name: MyApp-nodejs
entities.context: Node.js application with cross-platform data storage paths

entities.name: macOS
entities.context: Operating system with app data at ~/Library/Application Support/

entities.name: Windows
entities.context: Operating system with app data at %LOCALAPPDATA%

entities.name: Linux
entities.context: Operating system with app data at ~/.local/share/ or $XDG_DATA_HOME
